title: Communauté d'agglomération du Pays de Laon
summary: Communauté d'agglomération du Pays de Laon is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the town of Laon. It is located in the Aisne department, in the Hauts-de-France region, northern France. Created in 2014, its seat is in Aulnois-sous-Laon. Its area is 315.4 km2. Its population was 42,147 in 2019, of which 24,304 in Laon proper.
text:
Communauté d'agglomération du Pays de Laon is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the town of Laon. It is located in the Aisne department, in the Hauts-de-France region, northern France. Created in 2014, its seat is in Aulnois-sous-Laon. Its area is 315.4 km2. Its population was 42,147 in 2019, of which 24,304 in Laon proper.

Composition
The communauté d'agglomération consists of the following 38 communes:
